---
title: "About"
---
:::{.columns}
:::{.column width="60%"}
Hello! I am a PhD candidate in the Economics Department at the University of Wisconsin-Madison and an Innovation Policy Lab Fellow for the Congressional Research Service.

I am an applied microeconomist whose research focuses on topics in crime and housing. My research examines how social and public policy affect individual well-being.
:::

:::{.column width="40%"}
![](Daniels-Mary-16.jpg){fig-align="center" width="40%"}
:::
:::
